    DistillationColumn
    Models a tray based distillation column with optional condenser and reboiler.

  • Classes in neqsim.process.equipment.distillation used by neqsim.process.equipment.distillation
    Class
    Description
    ColumnSpecification
    Represents a column specification (degree of freedom) for a distillation column.
    ColumnSpecification.ProductLocation
    Indicates which end of the column this specification refers to.
    ColumnSpecification.SpecificationType
    Types of column specifications.
    Condenser
    Condenser class.
    DistillationColumn
    Models a tray based distillation column with optional condenser and reboiler.
    DistillationColumn.Builder
    Fluent builder for DistillationColumn.
    DistillationColumn.SimplifiedKvalueModel
    Simplified K-value model for the inside-out inner loop.
    DistillationColumn.SolverType
    Available solving strategies for the column.
    DistillationInterface
    DistillationInterface interface.

    Reboiler class.
